description: Fix direct-edit image display on canvas and add Lovart-style Mockup sticker/paste feature

userStories.title: Return generated image data from direct_edit and inpaint endpoints
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the backend to return the generated image element/file/url so the frontend can render it without relying solely on websocket broadcasts.
acceptanceCriteria: direct_edit returns element, file, and image_url in the response
inpaint returns element, file, and image_url in the response
Duplicate websocket image_generated broadcasts are avoided for direct-edit paths
Normal chat-generated images still broadcast via websocket
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added generate_image_with_provider_ex and broadcast flag on save_image_to_canvas.

userStories.title: Render direct-edit and inpaint results on the canvas
userStories.description: As a user, I want edited images to appear on the canvas immediately after the operation succeeds.
acceptanceCriteria: CanvasEditHandler emits Canvas::ImageAdded with returned image data on success
InpaintDialog emits Canvas::ImageAdded with returned image data on success
CanvasExcali listens for Canvas::ImageAdded and adds the image to Excalidraw
No duplicate images appear when websocket event also arrives
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Added Canvas::ImageAdded event and wired it through CanvasEditHandler, InpaintDialog, and CanvasExcali.

userStories.title: Backend Mockup compositing endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to paste a logo/design onto a target image so it looks like a real sticker or product mockup.
acceptanceCriteria: New POST /api/mockup endpoint accepts target_file_id, design_file_id, and transform options
Server composites design onto target using PIL with support for scale, rotate, opacity, shadow, and corner radius
Result is saved to canvas and returned as element/file/image_url
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented /api/mockup with PIL compositing in direct_edit_router.py.

userStories.title: Frontend Mockup dialog and Popbar integration
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Mockup button in the Popbar that opens a dialog to position and paste my design.
acceptanceCriteria: Mockup button added to PopbarActions
MockupDialog lets user pick a design image from canvas or upload
MockupDialog provides preview and adjustable transform parameters
On apply, call /api/mockup and emit Canvas::ImageAdded with the result
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Added MockupDialog, mockup API client, and integrated into PopbarActions.

userStories.title: i18n translations and final polish
userStories.description: As a user, I want all new UI labels to be available in Chinese and English.
acceptanceCriteria: Chinese and English translations added for Mockup and edit-display labels
Generated image is focused/selected after being added to canvas
All existing direct-edit actions still work
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Added zh-CN/en translations for inpaint and mockup; new images are auto-selected.

userStories.title: Inline selection editor with top-left task status
userStories.description: As a user, I want to draw the edit selection directly on the original image and see task status in the top-left instead of bottom toasts.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking Edit Element/Text opens a small prompt popup above the image
Selection rectangle is drawn on the original image with first click as top-left anchor
A top-left CanvasTaskStatus panel shows running/success/error states for edit/inpaint/mockup tasks
CanvasEditHandler, CanvasInpaintEditor, and MockupDialog emit task events instead of bottom toasts
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Replaced InpaintDialog with CanvasInpaintEditor portal overlay; added CanvasTaskStatus and task event bus.

userStories.title: Chat panel show/hide toggle
userStories.description: As a user, I want to collapse the right-side chat panel to give the canvas more space.
acceptanceCriteria: Chat header has a hide button
Hidden state shows a floating Show Chat button on the canvas
Resizable panel adapts to collapsed/expanded state
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added chatVisible state in canvas route and toggle button in Chat header.

userStories.title: Mockup image fusion instead of simple overlay
userStories.description: As a user, I want pasted logos/designs to blend with the target surface so they look painted/printed rather than layered on top.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend fuses design with target patch using color matching and blend modes
Auto blend mode picks appropriate mode based on target luminance and design contrast
Supports overlay, multiply, screen, soft_light, hard_light, color_dodge, color_burn, vivid_light, normal
Transparency of design is respected and target shows through empty areas
Python syntax check passes
userStories.notes: Implemented _fuse_design in direct_edit_router.py using numpy color transfer and blend modes.
